properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Have you wandered along on life’s pathway? Have you lived without love a life of fear? Have you searched for that great hidden meaning? Or is your life filled with long wasted years.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Wasted years wasted years oh how foolish As you walk on in darkness and fear Turn around, Turn around God is calling, He’s calling you from a life of wasted years.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Search for wisdom and understanding, There’s someone who knows and always hears. Come to Him! Come to Him! Your sins confessing, You can’t go on with a life of wasted years.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Don’t you know Jesus died for all the sinners? He loves you and all your guilt He gladly bears Give it up; give it up the load you’re carrying You can’t go on with a life of wasted years.
